use_cases: Reusable button component for form submissions and calls-to-action
Icon buttons for toolbars and compact UI areas
Destructive actions using the destructive variant
Secondary and ghost buttons for less prominent actions
ai_summary: A foundational Button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition and CVA for variant management. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Features standard accessible states including focus-visible outlines, hover effects, and disabled opacity. Shadow utility classes provide subtle depth while maintaining a flat, minimalist aesthetic suitable for any application.
